title: Smoky Japanese Stir Fry
description: A quick and delicious Japanese-inspired stir fry made with smoky and juicy flavors.

ingredients.name: Juicy cherry tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Fresh and ripe tomatoes are best

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of sesame oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the tofu and cook until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the cherry tomatoes, soy sauce, and sambal oelek to the skillet.
Stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until the tomatoes are tender.
Add the chopped green onions and stir-fry for another minute.
Serve the stir-fry over cooked rice and enjoy!
Optional: Add some stir-fry flavor with a small amount of stir-fry sauce or oyster sauce (for non-vegetarian option).
